name: Refinaria de Petroleos de Manguinhos S.A.
summary: Refinaria de Petr√É¬≥leos de Manguinhos S.A. refines petroleum products in Brazil. It offers gasoline, fuel oil, mineral turpentine, SPB, SBP S60, hexane food and chemical grade products, and heptane S7 and S8. The company also exports its products. The company was founded in 1945 and is based in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
